courses.heroDescription: Explore cutting-edge courses designed to equip you with the skills needed for the AI-driven future. Learn from industry experts and gain practical experience.
courses.ctaDescription: Join thousands of students who are already advancing their careers with our expert-led courses.

introAI.title: Introduction to AI
introAI.subtitle: Master AI concepts from basics to advanced neural networks with hands-on projects
introAI.description: Understand the basics, explore real-world applications, and unlock the power of AI for your future.
introAI.whatToExpect: Unlock the full potential of AI with practical hands-on skills using modern tools and frameworks. This structured learning path covers everything from basic concepts to advanced neural networks, preparing you for real-world challenges and industry opportunities.

curriculum.title: Module 1: Introduction to AI/ML and Python

learnEnglishAI.title: Learn English with AI
learnEnglishAI.subtitle: Improve your English fluency with AI-guided lessons and real-world practice
learnEnglishAI.description: Practice, improve, and communicate confidently with AI-guided lessons and real conversations.
learnEnglishAI.whatToExpect: This immersive English course helps you gain fluency through real conversations and AI-powered practice. Improve pronunciation, vocabulary, and communication skills in a structured and interactive environment.

1on1VirtualTutoring.title: 1 on 1 Virtual Tutoring
1on1VirtualTutoring.subtitle: Three live sessions a week. One hour each. A vetted teacher built around your level, your goals, and your schedule — delivered through DAIA Academy's secure learning platform.
1on1VirtualTutoring.description: Get personalized, live 1-on-1 guidance from an expert instructor tailored entirely to your goals and pace.
benefits: Personalized curriculum tailored to your goals
Flexible scheduling that fits your life
Real-world projects aligned to your career
Session recordings you can revisit anytime
requirements: Access to a computer with internet
Openness to learn and apply feedback
1on1VirtualTutoring.whatToExpect: Experience the fastest path to mastery with dedicated 1-on-1 attention. Your instructor will build a curriculum around your specific goals, meet you at your level, and accelerate your growth through focused feedback, real-world projects, and consistent accountability every month.

lessons: Set milestones for the first month

card.billingNote: Billed on the day of your first session — not before.
tutoringFeatures: A teacher matched to your level & goals
DAIA AI Assistant for practice between sessions

promise.p1Pre: When you sign up today, we securely save your payment method —
promise.p1Post: Within 72 hours, we'll match you with your personal teacher and schedule your first lesson.
promise.p2: If we can't match you in time, your card is released. No charge. No questions. No paperwork.
promise.p3Pre: Your billing cycle starts the day of your
promise.p3Post: — never the day you sign up. So every month you pay for is a full month of lessons, never a partial one.

howItWorks.subtitle: Four moments between signing up and your first lesson. Each one designed to protect your time and your money.

steps.title: You enroll
steps.desc: You complete checkout. Your card is securely saved through Stripe and authorized.

steps.title: We match you
steps.desc: We pair you with the right teacher based on your level, goals, and schedule. Your first lesson is booked.

steps.title: The cycle begins
steps.desc: You attend your first lesson. Your US$200 is charged, and your 30-day cycle of sessions begins from today.

steps.title: Renew or pause
steps.desc: Your next month renews automatically with another set of sessions. Cancel anytime before renewal — no penalty.

items.title: Cancellation policy
items.body: Cancel a scheduled lesson at least 24 hours in advance and it won't count against your monthly total. Inside 24 hours, the lesson is consumed.

items.title: Unused lessons
items.body: Lessons are designed to be used within your 30-day cycle and do not roll over. This protects your teacher's time and keeps you on a consistent learning rhythm.

items.title: If we miss 72 hours
items.body: If we don't match you within 72 hours of signup, your payment authorization is automatically released and you owe nothing. You can stay on the waitlist or walk away.

items.title: Refunds
items.body: Because we don't charge until your first lesson is delivered, refunds are rare. If something goes wrong after your cycle begins, contact support and we'll make it right.

items.title: Payment
items.body: All payments are processed securely by Stripe. We accept Visa, Mastercard, and American Express. Pricing is in US dollars; your bank may convert to RD$ at the daily rate.

items.title: Who teaches you
items.body: Every DAIA teacher is vetted for credentials, fluency, and teaching experience. Most are bilingual and familiar with the Dominican educational context.

cta.tutoringDesc: Match in 72 hours. First lesson scheduled before you're billed. Cancel anytime.
cta.defaultDesc: Join thousands of students advancing their skills with DAIA.

step1.title: Create your account

payment.stripeNote: Secured by Stripe · No charge until your teacher accepts

success.note: Check your email for a confirmation. No charge has been made.
